title: Crewing Superintendent
description:
Roles & Responsibilities

  • Plan and manage end-to-end crew change arrangements and Maintain up-to-date crew rotation plans and ensure adequate manning across all vessels.
  • Manage crew documentation (certificates, medicals, seaman books) and ensure compliance with statutory, flag state, and client requirements.
  • Liaise with vessel masters, manning agents, and regulatory authorities on all crew-related matters and Track crew performance, incident reports, and disciplinary cases.
  • Source, screen, and shortlist qualified crew candidates and Coordinate selection and interview arrangements with hiring managers; Manage onboarding processes, including SEA preparation, orientation, and induction; Maintain accurate crew personnel files.
  • Support HR reporting (manpower data, attrition, HR metrics) and Assist in crew payroll matters by verifying attendance, leave, and allowance updates.
  • Coordinate mandatory training, revalidation courses, cross-training, and succession planning for crew and Track training validity and ensure compliance with regulatory and company requirements.
  • Ensure crewing operations comply with MPA, MOM, STCW, flag state, and company policies and Support internal and external audits for crewing.
  • Administer crew insurance matters, including processing claims and communicating with Insurers and P&I clubs and Uphold confidentiality and data protection Standards.

Requirements:

· Diploma in Maritime Management, Business Administration, or equivalent.

  • Minimum 3 years experiences in crewing operations
  • Strong organizational, communication, and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • High level of professionalism, integrity, and attention to detail.

postedCompany.description:
Mondoil Ship Management Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-incorporated company . We specialize in comprehensive shipping services, including the chartering of ships and boats with crew, freight logistics, and ship brokering services.


As a dynamic and forward-looking organization, we currently manage three fleets and are actively expanding our fleet with a strategic goal of operating up to ten vessels in the near future. Our growth is driven by a commitment to operational excellence, safety, and sustainable maritime practices.

• Stable & Healthy Company: We are financially sound and steadily growing, offering long-term career stability.
• Positive Work Environment: Our team thrives in a collaborative, respectful, and inclusive culture.
• Career Growth: As we expand our fleet, we are creating new opportunities for advancement and leadership.
• Strategic Vision: Be part of a company that is shaping the future of regional shipping and logistics.


We are looking for passionate, skilled, and dedicated professionals to join our team and grow with us. Whether you're an experienced maritime manager or a motivated newcomer to the industry, Mondoil Ship Management offers a rewarding career path in a thriving sector
postedCompany.name: MONDOIL SHIP MANAGEMENT PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
